productDisplayName: Vans Men Classic Slip-On Black Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by skate boarders, the Classic Slip-on shoes come in a classic iconoclastic design that are skate board friendly. Team it with jeans and graphic tees. Upper Printed fabric uppers over for durability and comfort Check print for added style Padded collar and textile lining for extra comfort Elasticated sides on the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
